case_title: WILLIAM ANDERSON VS. ROARING 20'S, A CALIFORNIA BUSINESS et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 11/1/2005 TO JUSTIN G. REDEN, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ.

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Vacate Sanctions On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Sanctions issued on 11/1/2005 to Justin G. Reden, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.
